item.title: My Simple Cipher - TWCTF
item.author: Author
item.description: My Simple Cipher Overview Of The Challenge The challenge involved an encryption program which performed the following encryption to genereate the cipher text: 1 2 for i in range(0, len(message)): encrypted += chr((ord(message[i]) ^ ord(key[i % len(key)]) ^ ord(encrypted[i]))%128) encrypted is the ciphertext and a random ascii character was added to it before the encryption loop. The goal was to find the flag from a message which consisted essentially three parts
